Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. E. JACOB LUBARSKY OF THE LAW FIRM OF MCKENNA LONG & ALDRIDGE, TEL. NO. 267-4105 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 583.310 And 583.360 IS GRANTED FOR FAILURE TO FILE OR SERVE OPPOSITION.
